name: Asana
description: Project and task management with Asana via MCP server — manage workspaces, projects, tasks, comments, sections, and tags

fields.label: Personal Access Token
fields.description: Asana personal access token from https://app.asana.com/0/my-apps

workspaceGid.description: Default workspace GID to scope operations

readOnly.description: Restrict to read-only operations (disables create, update, delete)
